ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined Academia Eustathia in 1561. He was a well known criminal lawyer in Rome,with a turbulent life. Farinacci defended the Cenci brothers, accused of killing their father. See his biography by Aldo Mazzacane in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
